name: Kaito Katsuragi
bio: Believing that sleep is a fundamental aspect of human well-being, I strive to find the sweet spot where individual desires and collective values harmonize.

name: Akira Akane
bio: As the world evolves, so must our understanding of sleep. I seek to uncover the hidden patterns that govern our slumbering habits.

name: Taro Tachibana
bio: Sleep is not just a necessity, but a sacred ritual that binds us together. I fight for the collective understanding of sleep as a vital component of our shared humanity.

name: 賢者3
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
